name: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Gia Đình & Quan Hệ
description: Từ vựng về các thành viên gia đình và mối quan hệ

cards.example: My family is very important to me.
My father works in an office.
My brother is older than me.
My aunt lives in the countryside.
I see my cousins at family gatherings.
All my relatives came to the wedding.
I love my family very much.

name: 🍽️ Ăn Uống & Thực Phẩm
description: Từ vựng về đồ ăn, thức uống và nhà hàng

cards.example: Drink plenty of water every day.
Fish is good for your health.
An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
Too much sugar is bad for health.
What would you like to drink?
Red wine is good with dinner.

name: ✈️ Du Lịch & Sân Bay
description: Từ vựng về du lịch, sân bay và bay

cards.example: We took a trip to the beach.

name: 🏥 Bệnh Viện & Y Tế
description: Từ vựng về bệnh viện, khám bệnh và điều trị

cards.example: I have pain in my back.

name: 🏦 Ngân Hàng & Tài Chính
description: Từ vựng về ngân hàng, tiền bạc và tài chính

cards.example: I need to go to the bank.
I pay with a credit card.
I need to pay the bill.

name: 🚨 Khẩn Cấp & An Toàn
description: Từ vựng về tình huống khẩn cấp và an toàn

cards.example: The firefighter put out the fire.

name: ⚖️ Pháp Luật & Tòa Án
description: Từ vựng về pháp luật, tòa án và quyền

name: 🏛️ Chính Phủ & Chính Trị
description: Từ vựng về chính phủ, chính trị và quyền công dân

cards.example: The government passed a new law.

name: 🙏 Tôn Giáo & Niềm Tin
description: Từ vựng về tôn giáo, đức tin và nghi lễ

cards.example: We go to church on Sunday.

name: 🎉 Lễ Hội & Kỷ Niệm
description: Từ vựng về lễ hội, ngày kỷ niệm và sự kiện

cards.example: I have a gift for you.

name: 🧹 Việc Nhà & Dọn Dẹp
description: Từ vựng về việc nhà, dọn dẹp và giặt giũ

cards.example: Put clothes in the washing machine.

name: 🌱 Làm Vườn & Trồng Trọt
description: Từ vựng về làm vườn, cây trồng và nông nghiệp

name: 🔬 Khoa Học & Nghiên Cứu
description: Từ vựng về khoa học, thí nghiệm và nghiên cứu

cards.example: Mathematics is the language of science.
Cells are the building blocks of life.

name: 💼 Kinh Doanh & Thương Mại
description: Từ vựng về kinh doanh, thương mại và marketing

cards.example: I want to start a business.

name: 🍳 Nấu Ăn & Nhà Bếp
description: Từ vựng về nấu ăn, dụng cụ nhà bếp và công thức

cards.example: Drain the pasta in a colander.

name: 🎬 Phim Ảnh & Giải Trí
description: Từ vựng về phim ảnh, chương trình TV và sách

name: 💪 Thể Dục & Sức Khỏe
description: Từ vựng về thể dục, tập luyện và thể hình

cards.example: Cardio is good for the heart.

name: 🌪️ Thời Tiết Nâng Cao
description: Từ vựng nâng cao về thời tiết và thiên tai

cards.example: We had a shower this afternoon.

name: 🏠 Nhà Cửa & Đồ Đạc
description: Từ vựng về các phòng và đồ nội thất trong nhà

cards.example: They live in a big house.
My room is on the second floor.
She is cooking in the kitchen.
Open the window for fresh air.
We eat at the dining table.
I go to bed at 10 PM.
We sit on the sofa to watch TV.
There is a crack in the ceiling.
We relax in the living room.
We have dinner in the dining room.
I grow flowers in my garden.
The children play in the yard.
Park the car in the garage.
We store things in the basement.
Old boxes are in the attic.
We have a nice view from the balcony.
We have breakfast on the patio.

name: 🚗 Giao Thông & Du Lịch
description: Từ vựng về phương tiện giao thông và du lịch

cards.example: I take the bus to work.
I ride my bicycle to school.
We flew by airplane to Paris.
We need to go to the airport.
Our house is on Main Street.
I walk to the park every morning.
I love to travel to new places.
We took a trip to the beach.
The passengers got on the bus.
The pilot landed the plane safely.
The ship sailed across the ocean.
We took a boat ride on the river.
I called a taxi to go home.
We need to fill up with fuel.

name: 👔 Công Việc & Sự Nghiệp
description: Từ vựng về công việc, văn phòng và sự nghiệp

cards.example: I go to work at 8 AM.
My office is in the city center.
He works for a big company.
I have lunch with my colleagues.
We have a meeting at 2 PM.
He is a high school teacher.
I use a computer at work.
We are working on a new project.

name: 🏥 Sức Khỏe & Y Tế
description: Từ vựng về sức khỏe, bệnh tật và bác sĩ

cards.example: Take this medicine twice a day.
I have a pain in my back.
Exercise is good for your body.
He broke a bone in his leg.
Protect your skin from the sun.
I can hear with my ears.
Brush your teeth twice a day.
Cover your mouth when you sneeze.

name: 👕 Quần Áo & Thời Trang
description: Từ vựng về quần áo, giày dép và phụ kiện

cards.example: Wear a hat in the sun.
He wears a tie to work.

name: 🎨 Màu Sắc & Hình Dạng
description: Từ vựng về màu sắc, hình dạng và kích thước

name: ⚽ Thể Thao & Giải Trí
description: Từ vựng về thể thao, trò chơi và giải trí

cards.example: We had fun at the party.

name: 🎵 Âm Nhạc & Nghệ Thuật
description: Từ vựng về âm nhạc, nhạc cụ và nghệ thuật

cards.example: There is a statue in the park.

name: 💻 Công Nghệ & Máy Tính
description: Từ vựng về công nghệ, máy tính và internet

cards.example: I use the internet every day.
The printer is out of paper.

name: 🌳 Thiên Nhiên & Môi Trường
description: Từ vựng về thiên nhiên, cây cối và môi trường

name: 👕 Quần Áo & Thời Trang
description: Từ vựng về quần áo, giày dép và phụ kiện

cards.example: Wear a hat in the sun.
He wears a tie to work.

name: 🎨 Màu Sắc & Hình Dạng
description: Từ vựng về màu sắc, hình dạng và kích thước

name: ⚽ Thể Thao & Giải Trí
description: Từ vựng về thể thao, trò chơi và giải trí

cards.example: We had fun at the party.

name: 🎵 Âm Nhạc & Nghệ Thuật
description: Từ vựng về âm nhạc, nhạc cụ và nghệ thuật

cards.example: There is a statue in the park.

name: 💻 Công Nghệ & Máy Tính
description: Từ vựng về công nghệ, máy tính và internet

cards.example: I use the internet every day.
The printer is out of paper.

name: 🌳 Thiên Nhiên & Môi Trường
description: Từ vựng về thiên nhiên, cây cối và môi trường

name: 🌍 IELTS – Environment
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Môi trường

cards.example: Deforestation is destroying large areas of tropical rain forest.
It is crucial to preserve biodiversity for the health of our planet.
The destruction of the rainforests is contributing to global warming.
Investing in renewable energy helps combat climate change.
Flying less is one way to reduce your carbon footprint.
Pollution threatens the entire aquatic ecosystem.
Wildlife conservation is a global priority.
Factories must limit the release of harmful pollutants.
We need sustainable solutions to protect the environment.
Using reusable bags is an eco-friendly practice.

name: 🎓 IELTS – Education
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Giáo dục

cards.example: The school's curriculum is designed to be comprehensive and flexible.
Participating in extracurricular activities helps students develop soft skills.
The school places a strong emphasis on academic achievement.
Distance learning has become increasingly popular in recent years.
Rising tuition fees put financial pressure on many families.
She won a scholarship to study abroad.
Adult literacy programs are essential in developing countries.
Vocational training prepares students for specific trades.
High dropout rates are a concern in many urban schools.
Critical thinking is a valuable skill for the 21st century.

name: 💻 IELTS – Technology
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Công nghệ

cards.example: Artificial intelligence is transforming many industries.
Virtual reality is used for training simulations.
Automation has replaced many manual jobs.
Social media algorithms personalize your feed.
Strong cybersecurity measures protect against hacking.
Cloud computing allows remote access to files.
The app has a simple, user-friendly interface.
The company is known for its cutting-edge research.
Technological innovation has changed our daily lives.

name: 🩺 IELTS – Health
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Sức khỏe

cards.example: A sedentary lifestyle is a major risk factor for many chronic diseases.
A balanced diet rich in fruits and vegetables is essential for good health.
Regular exercise contributes to overall physical and mental well-being.
Diabetes is a common chronic disease worldwide.
Obesity rates have been rising in many developed countries.
A strong immune system helps fight off infections.
Life expectancy has increased significantly over the past century.
Vaccines have eradicated many deadly diseases.
The medication may cause side effects such as nausea.

cards.back: hệ thống chăm sóc sức khỏe
cards.example: A robust healthcare system is vital for any nation.

name: 💼 IELTS – Work & Career
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Công việc & Nghề nghiệp

cards.back: sự hài lòng với công việc
cards.example: Job satisfaction is often more important than a high salary.

cards.back: cân bằng công việc - cuộc sống
cards.example: Achieving a good work-life balance reduces stress.
She quickly climbed the career ladder at her firm.
Flexible hours allow employees to manage personal commitments.
People often prefer government jobs because of job security.
The unemployment rate dropped after the new policies.
Relevant qualifications increase your chances of getting hired.
An internship provides valuable work experience.
He worked hard and received a promotion within a year.
Her daily commute takes over an hour.

name: ✈️ IELTS – Travel & Tourism
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Du lịch

cards.example: Paris is a popular tourist destination.
Ecotourism aims to minimize environmental impact.
Preserving cultural heritage is important for future generations.
Backpackers often stay in hostels to save money.
We planned a detailed itinerary for our trip.
You need a visa to enter many countries.
I bought a souvenir from the local market.
Traveling during off-season can save you money.
The drive along the coast is incredibly scenic.

name: 📱 IELTS – Media & Communication
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Truyền thông

cards.example: Social media has changed the way we communicate.
Censorship is a controversial issue in many countries.
Fake news can spread rapidly online.
A journalist must report the truth.
Some news outlets show political bias.
Clickbait headlines are designed to get attention.
Many brands collaborate with social media influencers.
The video went viral within hours.
Always verify information before sharing it.

name: 🏛️ IELTS – Government & Politics
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Chính phủ & Chính trị

cards.example: The government introduced a new economic policy.
New legislation aims to reduce plastic waste.
The general election will take place next month.
The opposition party criticized the new law.

name: 👮 IELTS – Society & Crime
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Xã hội & Tội phạm

cards.example: Juvenile delinquency is often linked to family issues.
High recidivism rates indicate prison system failure.
Harsh punishments act as a deterrent.
Community service is an alternative to prison.
Discrimination based on race is illegal.

name: 🎨 IELTS – Art & Culture
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Nghệ thuật & Văn hóa

cards.example: Contemporary art can be challenging to understand.
Our heritage includes traditions and monuments.
The Mona Lisa is a masterpiece.
Performance art often involves live action.
Aesthetics is the study of beauty.
Efforts to preserve ancient buildings are essential.

name: 🔬 IELTS – Science
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Khoa học

cards.example: They work in a modern laboratory.
A breakthrough in cancer treatment was announced.
There is a correlation between diet and health.

name: 🌌 IELTS – Space
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Vũ trụ

cards.example: The Milky Way is our galaxy.
A black hole has strong gravity.

cards.back: hành tinh ngoài hệ mặt trời

cards.example: The Hubble telescope captures stunning images.
A space probe was sent to Mars.
Stars are millions of light-years away.

name: 🍽️ IELTS – Food & Nutrition
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Thực phẩm & Dinh dưỡng

cards.example: Organic food is grown without pesticides.
Rice is a staple food in Asia.
Food security is a global challenge.

name: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 IELTS – Family & Relationships
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Gia đình & Quan hệ

cards.example: A nuclear family consists of parents and children.
In many cultures, extended family lives together.
She is a full-time caregiver for her mother.
The generation gap can cause misunderstandings.
There is a strong bond between twins.
He is the breadwinner of the family.

name: 🛍️ IELTS – Shopping & Consumerism
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Mua sắm & Tiêu dùng

cards.back: lòng trung thành với thương hiệu

cards.example: The product comes with a two-year warranty.
This jacket was a real bargain.
The store offers a money-back guarantee.

name: ⚽ IELTS – Sports
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Thể thao

cards.example: Good stamina helps in long matches.
Team spirit is crucial for success.
The referee made a controversial call.
Recreational sports are fun and healthy.

name: 🐘 IELTS – Animals
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Động vật

cards.example: The forest is their natural habitat.
Bird migration occurs twice a year.

name: 🌦️ IELTS – Weather & Climate
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Thời tiết & Khí hậu

cards.example: Climate change is causing extreme weather.
High humidity makes it feel hotter.

name: 📈 IELTS – Business
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Kinh doanh

cards.example: The startup raised millions in funding.
The merger created a giant corporation.
They have a high profit margin.
The company has a virtual monopoly.

name: 🧠 IELTS – Psychology
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Tâm lý học

cards.example: Cognitive skills include memory and reasoning.
Perception can be influenced by expectations.
Personality is shaped by genetics and environment.
Anxiety can be treated with therapy.
Low self-esteem can lead to problems.

name: 📜 IELTS – History
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Lịch sử

cards.example: Ancient civilizations like Egypt were advanced.
The industrial revolution changed the world.
Feudal systems had lords and serfs.

name: 🗣️ IELTS – Language
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Ngôn ngữ

cards.example: English is a global lingua franca.

name: 🚗 IELTS – Transport
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Giao thông vận tải

cards.example: Traffic congestion is a daily problem.

name: ⚡ IELTS – Energy
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Năng lượng

cards.example: Renewable sources like solar are clean.
The company aims to be carbon neutral.

name: 🏙️ IELTS – Urban & Rural
description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Đô thị & Nông thôn

cards.example: Urbanization is rapid in developing countries.

cards.back: làn sóng di cư khỏi nông thôn
cards.example: The rural exodus leaves villages empty.
Green spaces improve quality of life.
The green belt prevents urban expansion.
